title: Strategy Analyst
description:
FedEx operates the world's largest express delivery network, shipping to 220+ countries with cutting-edge logistics technology.

We're seeking a Strategy Analyst to join our Logistics team in Rochester. This role offers the opportunity to contribute meaningfully to our mission while developing your professional skills in a collaborative environment.
responsibilities: Conduct market and competitive analysis to inform corporate strategy
Develop financial models and business case analyses for strategic initiatives
Support long-range planning and scenario analysis for logistics network optimization
Analyze operational data to identify efficiency opportunities and cost reduction
Prepare executive presentations and strategic recommendations
Monitor industry trends and assess impact on business strategy

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Business, Economics, Engineering, or related field
requirements.experience_years: 2-4 years in strategy, operations, management consulting, or finance
certifications: CPA, MBA, or consulting certifications preferred but not required
